quotes.zh: 行到水穷处，坐看云起时。
quotes.en: Walk to where the waters end; sit and watch the clouds rise.

quotes.zh: 会当凌绝顶，一览众山小。
quotes.en: I will climb the summit and see all mountains small.
quotes.sourceEn: Du Fu, View of the Mountain

quotes.zh: 千里之行，始于足下。
quotes.en: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.

quotes.zh: 不以物喜，不以己悲。
quotes.en: Be neither elated by external gains nor saddened by personal losses.

quotes.zh: 落霞与孤鹜齐飞，秋水共长天一色。
quotes.en: Sunset clouds and a lonely wild duck fly together; autumn waters share one color with the sky.
quotes.sourceEn: Wang Bo, Preface to Tengwang Pavilion

quotes.zh: 山重水复疑无路，柳暗花明又一村。
quotes.en: After mountains and rivers, no road seems; yet a village appears amid willows and blossoms.
quotes.sourceEn: Lu You, Visiting a Village West of the Hills

quotes.zh: 一望乡关风月愁，秋波送客泪如流。
quotes.en: Gazing toward home, wind and moon bring sorrow; autumn waves send off the traveler with flowing tears.

quotes.zh: 舟行千里水难渡，情意绵绵心更切。
quotes.en: A boat travels a thousand miles, waters hard to cross; affection lingers, the heart grows more eager.

quotes.zh: 问今是何世，乃不知有汉，无论魏晋。
quotes.en: They asked what dynasty it was now; they did not know of the Han, let alone the Wei or Jin.
quotes.sourceEn: Tao Yuanming, The Peach Blossom Spring

quotes.zh: 山如屏，一望无涯，碧波荡漾，秋光如画。
quotes.en: Mountains stand like a screen, stretching beyond sight; emerald waves ripple, autumn light like a painting.

quotes.zh: 寒上常带斜阳色，新月前朝落旷野。
quotes.en: The cold plateau often bears the hue of sunset; the new moon before dawn falls on the open wilderness.

quotes.zh: 细水浮花过日明，断云高入孤村。
quotes.en: Gentle water carries floating flowers past the bright sun; broken clouds drift high into the lonely village.

quotes.zh: 向晚风，空谷远，山如屏。
quotes.en: Evening wind, distant empty valley, mountains like a screen.

quotes.zh: 莫使黄鹂啼晓春，鸟声里，绿杨阴下白沙堤。
quotes.en: Do not let the orioles cry in the dawn spring; amid birdsong, under the green willow shade lies the white sand embankment.

quotes.zh: 三生石上结良缘，两小无嫌彼此痴。
quotes.en: On the Stone of Three Lives, a good bond is tied; two children, without suspicion, are infatuated with each other.

quotes.zh: 人间路有弯道，天外山推玉金深。
quotes.en: The human world's path has bends; beyond the heavens, mountains push jade and gold deep.

quotes.zh: 日落酒醒人已远，满园关情雨下西楼。
quotes.en: Sunset, sober from wine, the person already far; the whole garden is filled with emotion as rain falls west of the tower.

quotes.zh: 三春山更佳，三春山外山。
quotes.en: The mountains in late spring are even more beautiful; beyond the late spring mountains, more mountains lie.

quotes.zh: 青山绿水映红霞，白云朵朵飘飞。
quotes.en: Green hills and blue waters reflect red clouds; white clouds float in clusters.

quotes.zh: 一日看尽长安路，不知今夕是何年。
quotes.en: In one day, I've seen all the roads of Chang'an; I know not what evening this is, what year.

quotes.zh: 江间之胜，实乃此景。
quotes.en: The beauty of the river region is truly this scene.

quotes.zh: 日暮时，舟子唱余波。
quotes.en: At dusk, the boatman sings amid the lingering waves.

quotes.zh: 空蒙烟水寒，渔人歌互答。
quotes.en: Vast and misty, the waters are cold; fishermen's songs answer one another.

quotes.zh: 风鸣书与霜威重，云在南山高。
quotes.en: The wind howls, books and frost's might weigh heavy; clouds rest high on the southern mountain.

quotes.zh: 不足为外人道也。
quotes.en: It is not worth telling outsiders.
quotes.sourceEn: Tao Yuanming, The Peach Blossom Spring

quotes.zh: 自云先世避秦时乱，率妻子邑人来此绝境，不复出焉。
quotes.en: They said their ancestors fled the turmoil of the Qin, leading families and villagers to this secluded land, never to leave again.
quotes.sourceEn: Tao Yuanming, The Peach Blossom Spring

quotes.zh: 既出，得其船，便扶向路，处处志之。
quotes.en: Once out, he found his boat, and followed the old route, marking it at every turn.
quotes.sourceEn: Tao Yuanming, The Peach Blossom Spring

quotes.zh: 南阳刘子骥，高尚士也，闻之，欣然规往。
quotes.en: Liu Ziji of Nanyang, a noble scholar, heard of this and joyfully planned to go.
quotes.sourceEn: Tao Yuanming, The Peach Blossom Spring
